heading: How does Atlas calculate storage limits for Flex Clusters?
body:
Atlas calculates the storage limit for Flex clusters based on
data usage, as opposed to the `storageSize` metric used by
non-Flex clusters (which includes compression). Atlas determines
data usage by summing a cluster's `dataSize` and `indexSize`.  You
can issue the [db.stats()](manual/reference/method/db.stats)
method to view the values of these fields.
